mapper.select:
SELECT id, writer, title, guecontents, writedate, view_count as viewCount FROM guestable
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY writedate ASC
ORDER BY viewCount DESC
ORDER BY writedate DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, writer, title, guecontents, writedate, view_count as viewCount FROM guestable WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guestable
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE guestable SET view_count = view_count+1 WHERE id = #{id}
